title: pedicularis parryi subsp. parryi
intro: Pedicularis parryi subsp. parryi, also known as the Parry's lousewort, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. It belongs to the mint family and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing pain and inflammation associated with arthritis and other conditions. Pedicularis parryi subsp. parryi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory health and alleviate pain.
